summary: Pristine soundboard capture of an 84‑show highlighted by a killer Black Peter and smoking Slipknot! sequence.
review: Fans rave about the crystal‑clear SBD from Miller, calling it pristine and “crystal clear.” The performance itself is described as phenomenal, with Black Peter and Slipknot! singled out as standout moments throughout an otherwise well‑played set.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are overwhelmingly positive, praising both the superb soundboard quality and the high musical level; no criticisms were noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers describe the audio as crystal clear, pristine, and flawless – no drop‑outs or mix issues mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set is consistently strong; reviewers note the band “nailed” Black Peter and that Slipknot! (H/SF) shines as a highlight, indicating smooth pacing and high energy throughout.
